title: [v5.8] Fix `unless-stopped` containers not restarting after ...
body:
`podman-restart.service` stop them

When `podman-restart.service` stops containers, it marks them as "stopped by user" which breaks the `unless-stopped` restart policy. Add hidden `--not-stopped-by-user` flag to prevent this, allowing `unless-stopped` containers to restart on next boot.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28152
Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-4357

Cherry pick fixes: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-157746, https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-157747
Both of which are 0day fixes from RHEL 9.8 & 10.2

(cherry picked from commit 7326b862e3041bf38fbb798b4ee0994bc99034ec)
